messages.content:
You extract structured parameters for an API call from a user query.
API function `compute`: Performs a mathematical computation or operation using Wolfram Alpha.

Return ONLY a single JSON object that conforms to this JSON schema (no prose, no markdown, no code fences):
{"properties": {"wolfram_query": {"description": "The mathematical computation / operation to perform, e.g. 'integrate cos(x)/sqrt(x) from 0 to 1'", "title": "Wolfram Query", "type": "string"}}, "required": ["wolfram_query"], "title": "ComputeParams", "type": "object"}

Infer sensible values from the query. Any date must be 'YYYY-MM-DD'. Any hour must be two-digit 24-hour 'HH'.
Calculate the area of a rectangle with length 123.45 cm and width 67.89 cm, then convert the result to square inches to the nearest integer.
